description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python cibuildwheel that runs on pushes to master, main, develop, and actions_pypi branches, as well as tags matching v*, and on pull requests to those branches. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build and test Python wheels on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest environments with Python versions 3.6 to 3.11. It checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.9, installs dependencies, extracts the version, builds and tests wheels using cibuildwheel, and uploads the artifacts to PyPI or TestPyPI.
